question: How to verify rendering without visual inspection?
choice: Deterministic pixel tests. Render a known scene to a buffer, hash the output, compare to expected hash. One comparison = one line of output = ~10 tokens. Also: render single pixels and assert exact RGBA values for edge cases.
why: Taking a screenshot cost ~2000 tokens and told me nothing the compiler didnt already guarantee. A hash comparison costs 10 tokens and gives a binary PASS/FAIL.
